queue_item.action: Implement a deterministic provenance-preserving reducer for ACTIVE_QUEUE.json plus additive queue-update records.

progress.verification: Implementation and four deterministic test cases are committed. No GitHub Actions run exists for the test commit, and test execution is not claimed.

queue_item.handoff: Run the tests and full retained queue-update corpus in CI. Add explicit event_order and observed_at fields to future queue updates, retain the generated materialized view plus source map as evidence, and fail promotion when conflicts remain unresolved.

preservation_rule: This additive queue update does not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' records, or Git history.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository files, abstract project-memory metadata, and commit history were used. No private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal content, or unreviewed uploads were published.
next_action: Execute the committed test suite and repository-wide corpus materialization, then retain the non-authoritative generated view, field source map, and any unresolved conflict report.
